_comment: OpenClaw HTTP tool definitions for Casey — Place Order flow

tools.name: blossom_login
tools.description: Login to Blossom school catering system and get an access token. Call this before placing an order, or when a 401 is received.

role.description: User role. Use PARENT for family accounts.

tools.name: blossom_quick_order
tools.description: Place a meal order on Blossom by providing the child username, date, session and dish names. No UUIDs needed — dish names are matched by partial name. Requires a valid access token from blossom_login.

childUsername.description: The student's login username, e.g. family_studentname

dishes.description: List of dish names (max 5). Partial names are fine, e.g. 'Beef Rice' matches 'Beef Rice Bowl'.
